description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the 'TaxiFareProcessor' solution. The application reads a large dataset (taxi-fare-train.csv) and aggregates the total fare and fares grouped by payment type using 'Parallel.ForEach'. The current implementation contains race conditions involving a 'decimal totalFare' and a standard 'Dictionary<string, decimal> fareByPaymentType' being updated concurrently. Fix the thread-safety issues in Program.cs so the application consistently completes without errors and produces deterministic totals in out/results.json. Retain the 'Parallel.ForEach' loop structure for performance, ensuring that synchronization is applied only to shared-state updates.
